rationale: Both my R2 nits are addressed at 77d8a1a9. 7(a): cmd/** is DROPPED from Impacted Domains — it survives only as a descriptive Background citation (cmd/mindspec/next.go:459, an existing consumer, not a change surface) plus an explicit disposition note; no cmd/ file in Scope. 7(b): the execution self-ownership gap is evidence-refuted accurately — execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml carries no self-path while workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:27 does; verified pre-existing, not introduced by 115, correctly out of scope. New gitutil surface: internal/gitutil/** is declared under EXECUTION (execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml:4, verified), the correct owner for the BranchExistsE seam; BranchExists confirmed fail-open at gitops.go:94-100. Every touched Scope path maps to its declared owner: approve/complete/lifecycle/panel/setup/.claude+.agents skills→workflow; executor+gitutil→execution. No parity gap. Decomposition: ~2-3 beads is sound — In Scope cleaves cleanly into prerequisite seams (gitutil+lifecycle error-preserving core+complete predicate export, all byte-identical refactors) vs the approve gate consumer; the 1-function gitutil seam is correctly folded with lifecycle, not over-fragmented; nothing forces an oversized bead-1 (final split is plan-mode's call). Discriminators verified RED: ScanOrphanedClosedBeads 0 hits, named tests absent, h4n5 persisted (grep -c=1).

findings.item_1_branch_probe_fail_open: ADDRESSED — BranchExistsE(name)(bool,error) declared as a NEW seam beside unchanged BranchExists (Scope + Impacted Domains execution); branch-probe listed as the 4th fail-closed leg; AC1 gains TestApproveImpl_BranchProbeErrorFailsClosed (verified absent = RED); gitutil correctly added under execution.
findings.item_2_nondiscriminating_ac_proofs: ADDRESSED — every AC1-AC7 pairs a grep -q 'func Test<Name>' discriminator with an exact go test -run; spot-verified RED: ScanOrphanedClosedBeads 0 hits repo-wide, TestApproveImpl_OrphanRefuses / BranchProbeErrorFailsClosed / ScanOrphanedClosedBeads_ErrorPreserving / PendingObligationPredicate all absent at 77d8a1a9.
findings.item_3_ac7_import_cycle: ADDRESSED — AC7 split into TestCompleteRun_RegatesAlreadyClosedOrphan (package-local internal/complete) + TestApproveImpl_PassesAfterOrphanSettled (internal/approve); no cross-package cycle, existence checks on both.
findings.item_4_branchless_recovery_untruthful: ADDRESSED — Req 3 + AC6(a) + ADR-0035 touchpoint give the branch-less case a DISTINCT recourse naming the branch-ref restoration prerequisite (3 spec mentions), separate from the with-branch mindspec complete <bead> line; branchless reconciliation deferred to mindspec-h4n5.
findings.item_5_persist_h4n5: ADDRESSED — grep -c mindspec-h4n5 .beads/issues.jsonl == 1 at 77d8a1a9 (separate chore(beads) commit 77d8a1a9).
findings.item_6_ac10_exactly_one_claimant: ADDRESSED — AC10 upgraded to a whole-set grep -l invariant across all OWNERSHIP.yaml asserting the single claimant == workflow; verified: internal/lifecycle at workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:9, absent from execution file, so grep -l returns exactly the workflow path.
findings.item_7_cmd_overdeclared_and_execution_se: ADDRESSED — (a) cmd/** dropped from Impacted Domains (only a descriptive Background citation remains + a disposition note); (b) execution self-ownership gap evidence-refuted accurately as pre-existing/out-of-scope (execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml has no self-path; workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml:27 does); gitutil surface added under EXECUTION (correct owner, execution/OWNERSHIP.yaml:4), no parity gap; decomposition ~2-3 beads sound and cleanly cleavable (seams vs gate).
